revision.comment: Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: {{sister-inline |short={{{short|}}} |project=commons |list={{{list|}}} |links={{#if:{{{links|}}}|{{{links}}}|<!-- -->{{#invoke:Commons link|getGalleryOrCategory|{{{1|}}}|linktext={{{2|}}}|search={{{search|}}}|<!-- -->qid={{{qid|}}}|italic={{{italic|}}}|tracking={{#if:{{{search|}}}{{{notrack|}}}||1}}}}}} |extratext={{{extratext|}}}}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23176857634|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{sister-inline |short={{{short|}}} |project=commons |list={{{list|}}} |links={{#if:{{{links|}}}|{{{links}}}|<!-- -->{{#invoke:Commons link|getGalleryOrCategory|{{{1|}}}|linktext={{{2|}}}|search={{{search|}}}|<!-- -->qid={{{qid|}}}|italic={{{italic|}}}|tracking={{#if:{{{search|}}}{{{notrack|}}}||1}}}}}} |extratext={{{extratext|}}}}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Commons-inline here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Commons-inline for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{sister-inline
|short={{{short|}}}
|project=commons
|list={{{list|}}}
|links={{#if:{{{links|}}}|{{{links}}}|<!--
   -->{{#invoke:Commons link|getGalleryOrCategory|{{{1|}}}|linktext={{{2|}}}|search={{{search|}}}|<!--
          -->qid={{{qid|}}}|italic={{{italic|}}}|tracking={{#if:{{{search|}}}{{{notrack|}}}||1}}}}}}
|extratext={{{extratext|}}}}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: trying to do a last fix of these, they will be fixed and not bloat the site
